recommended.song_name: Somebody That I Used To Know

content:

[tab][ch]Cm[/ch]
Where are the crowd[/tab]

We're c-coming out

Got my flash on it's true

Need that picture of you

Garage glamorous

But this photo of us
[tab]            [ch]Ab[/ch]
It don't have a price[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]Fm[/ch]
